CVE-2025-58933.title: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP ...
CVE-2025-58933.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in axiomthemes Anubis anubis allows PHP Local File Inclusion.This issue affects Anubis: from n/a through <= 1.25.
